# LSR Realty — Real Estate Investment Advisory, Gurgaon

> Institutional-grade, data-driven real estate investment advisory for HNI, UHNI and NRI investors in Gurgaon and Gurugram, India. LSR Realty is the advisory arm of LSR Group.

LSR Realty provides research-backed, conflict-free investment advice for high-net-worth individuals, ultra-high-net-worth individuals, and NRI investors seeking exposure to Gurgaon's premium real estate market. We cover both residential (luxury and ultra-luxury apartments, villas) and commercial (Grade A office, high-street retail, mall retail) segments.

## Services

- [Office Leasing](https://lsrrealty.com/services): Curated Grade A office space across Gurgaon matched to team size, budget, and growth plans. Corridors covered: Golf Course Road, Udyog Vihar, Cyber City, SPR, DLF Cyber Park.
- [Retail Leasing](https://lsrrealty.com/services): High street and mall retail leasing in prime Gurgaon catchments, backed by footfall analysis and trade mix expertise. High streets, malls, mixed-use developments.
- [Investment Advisory](https://lsrrealty.com/services): Bespoke portfolio strategies for HNI and NRI investors based on risk appetite, holding period, and IRR targets. Residential and commercial both covered.
- [Market Research](https://lsrrealty.com/services): Institutional-grade reports on Gurgaon micro-markets, price trends, infrastructure pipeline and absorption data.
- [Deal Structuring](https://lsrrealty.com/services): Negotiation support, legal due diligence, and financial structuring for complex real estate transactions.
- [NRI Services](https://lsrrealty.com/services): End-to-end management for overseas Indian investors under FEMA guidelines — from property identification to acquisition, rental management, and exit. NRE/NRO account compliance handled.
- [Inventory Sourcing](https://lsrrealty.com/services): Off-market and pre-launch inventory sourced through exclusive developer relationships and broker network.

## Key Locations Covered in Gurgaon

- **Golf Course Extension Road (GCER, Sectors 58–65)**: Premium residential, now Gurgaon's #1 investment corridor. Projects: DLF Arbour, DLF Privana, Emaar Serenity, Elan Paradise. Typical price: ₹15,000–25,000/sqft.
- **Golf Course Road**: Established luxury residential and Grade A commercial. Godrej Aria, Emaar IBC. Typical price: ₹18,000–30,000/sqft.
- **Dwarka Expressway**: New-age residential with metro connectivity. NH-8 connected. Typical price: ₹10,000–18,000/sqft.
- **Sohna Road / SPR (Southern Peripheral Road)**: Mid-to-premium residential with good rental yield. Typical price: ₹8,000–14,000/sqft.
- **New Gurgaon / Manesar**: Long-term appreciation play under Master Plan 2031. Industrial and residential.

## Current Projects Advised

**Residential Investment:**
- DLF The Arbour (Sector 63, GCER) — Ultra luxury 4 BHK+Staff, 3,900+ sqft, ₹9.3–9.5 Cr. RERA: GGM/671/403/2023/15. Developer: DLF Ltd.
- DLF Privana South (Sector 76–77) — Luxury 4 BHK, 3,577–5,472 sqft, ₹7.5 Cr+. RERA: HARERA/GGM/772/504/2023/116. Developer: DLF Ltd.
- Emaar Serenity (Sector 65) — Premium 3/4 BHK residential. Developer: Emaar India.
- Westin Residences — Branded luxury residences. Developer: Westin/Marriott partnered.
- Elan Paradise, Elan Town Centre, Elan Miracle, Elan Mercado, Elan Epic — Developer: Elan Group.
- Godrej on Golf Course Road — Developer: Godrej Properties.

**Commercial Leasing:**
- AIPL Joy Street, Joy District, Joy Square, Joy Central, Joy Gallery — Commercial/Retail. Developer: AIPL.
- Vatika First India Place, Vatika Business Park, Vatika Professional Point — Grade A office. Developer: Vatika.
- Magnum Global Park (Office + Retail) — Sector 58. Developer: Magnum Estate.
- DLF Corporate Greens — Grade A office. Developer: DLF Ltd.
- DLF Cyber City, Emaar IBC — Premium office space.
- GardenCity Arcade, Landmark One — Retail/Mixed use.

## Blog / Market Intelligence

- [Golf Course Extension Road vs Golf Course Road: Why GCER Is Gurgaon's New Investment Address](https://lsrrealty.com/blog/golf-course-extension-road-vs-golf-course-road-gurgaon): In-depth analysis. One LSR Realty client's property on GCER went from ₹4.68 Cr (Sep 2021) to ₹17 Cr (2026) — 263% appreciation in under 5 years. Covers price data by project, WHY GCER outperformed GCR, and what investors should do next.
- [Gurgaon Manesar Master Plan 2031 Explained: What Every Property Investor Needs to Know](https://lsrrealty.com/blog/gurgaon-manesar-master-plan-2031-explained): Plain-English guide to the Gurgaon Manesar Master Plan 2031. Covers land-use zones, transport corridors (metro, Dwarka Expressway, GCER, Sohna Road), RERA linkage, and how to use the master plan to evaluate property investments in Gurugram.

## Reference Resources

- [Gurgaon Master Plan 2031](https://lsrrealty.com/maps/gurgaon-manesar-master-plan): Official Gurgaon-Manesar Urban Complex Final Development Plan 2031 map with land use tables, sector coverage up to Sector 115, metro corridors, and free high-resolution download.
- [Gurgaon Master Plan 2041 Tracker](https://lsrrealty.com/gurgaon-master-plan-2041): Current status of the upcoming 2041 plan, expected changes vs 2031, and GMDA infrastructure planning for 55 lakh projected population.
- [Gurgaon Sector Maps Library](https://lsrrealty.com/maps): Approved sector layout plans for 75+ Gurugram locations including DLF phases, Golf Course Road, Dwarka Expressway, Sohna Road, SPR, and IMT Manesar.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Which is the best real estate consultant in Gurgaon?**
LSR Realty is among Gurgaon's top real estate investment advisors, offering institutional-grade advisory for HNI, UHNI and NRI investors. With deep expertise across GCER, GCR, Dwarka Expressway and Sohna Road, LSR Realty provides data-driven investment guidance, office and retail leasing, and portfolio structuring. Office: 911, Magnum Global Park, Sector 58, Gurugram. Phone: +91 8448660019.

**How to invest in Gurgaon real estate?**
Key steps: (1) Select the right micro-market based on budget and investment horizon. (2) Verify RERA registration at RERA Haryana portal. (3) Perform legal title search and due diligence. (4) Structure the deal for optimal tax efficiency (stamp duty, capital gains planning). LSR Realty handles all of these for its clients.

**Can NRIs buy property in Gurgaon?**
Yes. Under FEMA guidelines, NRIs can purchase residential and commercial properties (not agricultural land). Funding via NRE or NRO accounts. Repatriation allowed for up to 2 residential properties. LSR Realty's NRI Desk manages the entire process remotely.

**What is the property rate per sqft in Gurgaon in 2026?**
Golf Course Extension Road: ₹15,000–25,000/sqft. Golf Course Road: ₹18,000–30,000/sqft. Dwarka Expressway: ₹10,000–18,000/sqft. Sohna Road: ₹8,000–14,000/sqft. Contact LSR Realty for project-specific pricing.

**What is the best area to buy a flat in Gurgaon?**
For capital appreciation: Golf Course Extension Road (Sectors 58–65). For established luxury: Golf Course Road. For value with growth: Dwarka Expressway. For rental yield: Sohna Road / SPR. Best choice depends on budget and investment horizon.

**What does real estate investment advisory cost in Gurgaon?**
LSR Realty's advisory fee is typically a brokerage/referral arrangement with developers or landlords — no upfront cost to investors. For independent consultancy assignments, fees are agreed case by case. Contact marketing@lsrrealty.com.

**What is GCER in Gurgaon?**
GCER stands for Golf Course Extension Road, also called Golf Course Extn Road or Sector Road connecting Sectors 58–65 in Gurgaon. It runs from Golf Course Road (Sector 55/56 junction) to Sohna Road and SPR. It has become Gurgaon's top residential investment corridor since 2020, overtaking Golf Course Road in price appreciation.

## About LSR Realty

LSR Realty is the advisory arm of LSR Group, combining legacy Gurgaon real estate expertise with institutional knowledge. The team serves clients across India and internationally, with a focus on making institutional-quality real estate analysis available to individual investors.
